textByHashes.9aba61bf53456126d09795054495b4046356f267: Ah! You got inside at last! You spent all that time fumbling around outside, I thought you'd never make it here.
textByHashes.147cf3224d8d05e0f923073fce834eb6cf7b5304: Oh, I can see what is happening in my realm. I have sent clues to help you get here, such as the fisherman, and the crone.
textByHashes.5f4bb7408d4116a83ff8e2d6313b7585e87567d7: Ah excellent. A knight come to seek the Holy Grail. Maybe our land can be restored to its former glory.
textByHashes.6201ffc65cef23e3cbc128edbfdefc9ca1d87eb9: At the moment the Grail cannot be removed from the castle. Legend has it a questing knight will one day work out how to restore our land; then he will claim the Grail as his prize.
textByHashes.19b43fe72cf4634e4ee53e7b1d4ad03a1c587133: Nope, I don't feel so good either.
textByHashes.af773c9878f7776b02422f582c3f6d427ddbca1f: I fear my life is running short... Alas, my son and heir is not here. I am waiting for my son to return to this castle.
textByHashes.070300d449cd524b0f40a92210907a1c46f5836c: If you could find my son, that would be a great weight off my shoulders.
textByHashes.56d4bddaf021c2525b2b599736f795b4199604cf: I believe he is a knight of the round table.
textByHashes.af486275f2c0673992500d7fb042f76230036df7: No, not at all. Please, be my guest.
